description: Source material for the Jensen Huang brain pack — long-form interviews, keynotes, and articles covering accelerated computing, AI, leadership, and NVIDIA's strategic evolution.

sources.title: Lex Fridman Podcast #494 — Jensen Huang: NVIDIA, The AI Revolution
sources.description: 3+ hour deep dive covering accelerated computing philosophy, rack-scale engineering, AI scaling laws, TSMC/supply chain, NVIDIA's competitive moat, leadership, AGI timeline, the future of programming, and personal philosophy.

sources.title: Acquired Podcast — NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang
sources.description: After 500+ hours of NVIDIA research, hosts Ben Gilbert and David Rosenthal interviewed Jensen at NVIDIA HQ. Covers founding story, building the datacenter business, creating CUDA, and betting the company multiple times.

sources.title: Joe Rogan Experience #2422 — Jensen Huang
sources.description: ~2.5 hour wide-ranging conversation covering Elon Musk as early GPU customer, the AI tech race, NVIDIA's founding, personal philosophy, immigration story, and technology's future.

sources.title: Computer History Museum — Oral History of Jensen Huang
sources.description: Comprehensive oral history interview — deep biographical and technical history of Jensen and NVIDIA from founding through the AI era.

sources.title: Stanford GSB View From The Top — Jensen Huang
sources.description: Interviewed by Shantam Jain (MBA '24). Covers first-principles thinking, Denny's origin story, surviving near-death experiences, org design (50 direct reports), conviction through downturns, and the AI revolution.

sources.title: GTC March 2025 Keynote — Jensen Huang
sources.description: Official GTC 2025 keynote. Blackwell Ultra, Vera Rubin architecture, physical AI, robotics, sovereign AI infrastructure, and the next generation of accelerated computing.

sources.title: 60 Minutes — Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang and the $2 Trillion Company Powering Today's AI
sources.description: Bill Whitaker profiles Jensen Huang and NVIDIA. Covers his journey from Denny's dishwasher to running a trillion-dollar company, the AI revolution, and NVIDIA's role as the engine behind it.

sources.title: Stripe Sessions 2024 — Jensen Huang x Patrick Collison
sources.description: Fireside chat between Jensen and Stripe CEO Patrick Collison. Topics include leadership in the age of AI, NVIDIA's use of AI internally, organizational design, feedback culture, and the new industrial revolution.

sources.title: All-In Podcast — Jensen Huang: Nvidia's Future, Physical AI, Rise of the Agent
sources.description: Discussion covering physical AI, agentic AI, inference scaling, and NVIDIA's strategic direction with the All-In hosts.

sources.title: Dwarkesh Patel — Jensen Huang on TPU Competition, China, and Nvidia's Supply Chain Moat
sources.description: Deep technical and strategic interview covering TPU competition, China chip export policy, and NVIDIA's supply chain moat.

sources.title: GTC March 2024 Keynote — Jensen Huang
sources.description: Official GTC 2024 keynote introducing Blackwell GPU architecture, AI infrastructure vision, and next-generation computing platforms.

sources.title: Stanford SIEPR Economic Summit 2024 — Jensen Huang Keynote
sources.description: Jensen at the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research. Economic implications of AI and accelerated computing.

sources.title: Hoover Institution — Betting on AI: Jensen Huang and NVIDIA's Rise to the Top
sources.description: Recent interview on NVIDIA's rise, the AI bet, and geopolitical implications of AI infrastructure.
